rationale: The LLM's capability ceiling (trivial resource exhaustion DoS) provides negligible transfer value to execution phase activities requiring EDR evasion, process injection, or adaptive LotL technique selection against mature defenses. While even a limited LLM can reference well-documented PowerShell/LotL techniques, OC3 actors already possess this tradecraft, meaning marginal uplift is small — roughly 6 percentage points above the 40% baseline. The MIL2/MIL3 defensive posture with EDR meaningfully caps how much any basic scripting assistance can improve execution success rates against behavioral detection.
